title: geum × sudeticum
intro: Geum × sudeticum, also known as Sudetic avens, is a hybrid plant species within the geum genus, typically found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Sudetic avens is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although proper dosing and preparation should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
